testsuite.name: com.sisense.footer.CareersTest

testcase.name: verifyHomeBreadcrumbTitleUnderCareersPage
testcase.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Scroll to Footer section.
Click on Careers Link under Footer successfully.
Click on Home breadcrumb.
Sisense Home Page title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

testcase.name: verifyCareerPageTitleUnderFooter
testcase.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Scroll to Footer section.
Click on Careers Link under Footer successfully.
Careers Page Title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

testcase.name: verifyDepartmentFilter
testcase.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Scroll to Footer section.
Click on Careers Link under Footer successfully.
Switched to iframe
Scroll to search heading
Scroll to the 'Current Openings at Sisense' section successfully.
Click on department input
Dropdown options found: 2
Close department input After Count size
Click on department input (loop iteration 1)
Selected department option: Product Engineering
Search result displayed: Product Engineering
âœ… Department matched for: Product Engineering
Cleared selected department
Click on department input (loop iteration 2)
Selected department option: Sales
Search result displayed: Sales
âœ… Department matched for: Sales
Cleared selected department
Sisense Testing is passed.

testcase.name: verifyBookaliveDemoPageTitleUnderFooterSection
testcase.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Scroll to Footer section.
Click on Careers Link under Footer successfully.
Scroll to Footer section.
Click on Book a Live Demo button under Footer successfully.
Sisense Demo page title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

testcase.name: verifyAboutBreadcrumbTitleUnderCareersPage
testcase.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Scroll to Footer section.
Click on Careers Link under Footer successfully.
Click on About breadcrumb.
Sisense About page title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

testcase.name: verifyDemoPageTitleUnderHeaderSection
testcase.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Scroll to Footer section.
Click on Careers Link under Footer successfully.
Click on the Demo button.
Page title: Request a Demo - See Sisense Transform Your Data Analytics
Url : https://www.sisense.com/demo/
Sisense Demo page title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

testcase.name: verifyGreatPlacetoWorkPageTitleUnderAwardsSection
testcase.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Scroll to Footer section.
Click on Careers Link under Footer successfully.
Scroll to the 'Awards and recognition' section successfully.
Click on 'Great Place to Work' link under Awards and Recognition section successfully.
Sisense Great Place to Work Page Title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

testcase.name: verifyComparablyPageTitleUnderAwardsSection
testcase.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Scroll to Footer section.
Click on Careers Link under Footer successfully.
Scroll to the 'Awards and recognition' section successfully.
Click on 'Comparably' link under Awards and Recognition section successfully.
Comparably page opened successfully.
Sisense Comparably Page Title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

testcase.name: verifyCreateAlertPageTitleUnderCurrentOpeningsAtSisenseSection
testcase.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Scroll to Footer section.
Click on Careers Link under Footer successfully.
Scroll to the 'Current Openings at Sisense' section successfully.
Click on the 'Create Alert' link under the Current Openings at Sisense section successfully.
Create Alert page title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

testcase.name: verifyViewallopenrolesPageTitleUnderHeader
testcase.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Scroll to Footer section.
Click on Careers Link under Footer successfully.
Clicking on 'View all open roles' button under Header.
Click on 'View all open roles' button under Header successfully.
Sisense View All Open Roles Page Title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.
